summary: Validated the Pingo mascot halo fix on the login screen. Verified via (a) programmatic alpha inspection: all Pingo PNGs (logo/waving/clipboard/etc.) now have strictly binary alpha values (0 or 255) with 0 semi-transparent pixels and 0 residual magenta chroma-key pixels; (b) visual inspection of the running Expo web preview at 390x844 (mobile viewport) — patient login (blue gradient) shows the waving Pingo cleanly with crisp edges and no orange halo/rectangle; doctor login (orange gradient) shows the clipboard Pingo cleanly with no halo/rectangle behind him. Full flow (role-select → login → home) works for both patient (camila@email.com) and doctor (ana@aloclinica.com). btn-login navigates to /(patient)/home and /(doctor)/home respectively and both dashboards render correctly. Halo fix is confirmed working.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: on first cold navigation the onb-skip button click at the top of onboarding did not visibly advance to /role-select in a single automated click (needed direct nav). Not blocking and may just be a timing artifact of the automation run; worth a manual check by main agent that onb-skip reliably transitions to /role-select.
AnimatedPingo uses expo-image with contentFit='contain' and no background — implementation is correct and no tint that could reintroduce a halo.
Login hero uses LinearGradient behind AnimatedPingo — because PNG alpha is now binary, no soft-edge blending against the gradient occurs (which was the root cause of the reported halo).
seed_data_creation: None. Mocked auth uses pre-filled credentials from login.tsx.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Alpha binarization of /app/frontend/assets/pingo/*.png via /app/scripts/binarize_alpha.py is verified: alpha values are strictly {0,255}, no residual magenta pixels in opaque regions. Visual verification at 390x844 mobile viewport confirms no halo on either patient (blue gradient) or doctor (orange gradient) login hero. Full flow role-select → login?role={patient|doctor} → /(patient|doctor)/home works. Note that role-select is at path /role-select. Onboarding lives at /onboarding with an onb-skip testID; direct navigation to /role-select is reliable if the skip flow appears flaky.
rca_of_issue: Original halo was caused by semi-transparent alpha pixels on the outer edge of the Pingo PNGs (result of the chroma-key/alpha-matting pipeline against a magenta background). Those pre-multiplied edge pixels retained a magenta-ish tint that visually blended into the surrounding colored gradient and read as an orange/pink rectangle behind Pingo. Fix (/app/scripts/binarize_alpha.py) thresholds alpha: >=128 → 255, <128 → 0, eliminating all semi-transparent edges. Verified programmatically (alpha ∈ {0,255}, magenta_ish=0) and visually (crisp cutout on both blue and orange gradients).
